verification_commands.name: arc-web-sync-task-verify
command: from pathlib import Path; root=Path(r"D:\project\PDC2\pdc_src\pdc-arc-root\arc-web"); required=["src/main/java/com/aspire/hlwjf/pdc/arc/web/controller/FlexibleTariffSyncTaskController.java","src/main/java/com/aspire/hlwjf/pdc/arc/web/service/impl/FlexibleTariffSyncTaskServiceImpl.java","src/main/java/com/aspire/hlwjf/pdc/arc/web/service/TariffSyncTaskService.java","src/main/java/com/aspire/hlwjf/pdc/arc/web/entity/ArcSyncBatchEntity.java","src/main/java/com/aspire/hlwjf/pdc/arc/web/entity/ArcSyncTaskDetailEntity.java","src/main/resources/mapper/ArcSyncBatchMapper.xml","src/main/resources/mapper/ArcSyncTaskDetailMapper.xml","src/main/java/com/aspire/hlwjf/pdc/arc/web/listener/TariffAuditPassedListener.java"]; missing=[str(p) for p in required if not (root / p).exists()]; assert not missing, "missing files"; text=(root / "src/main/java/com/aspire/hlwjf/pdc/arc/web/controller/FlexibleTariffSyncTaskController.java").read_text(encoding="utf-8"); assert "/flexibleTariff/syncTask" in text; assert "TariffSyncTaskService" in text; print("arc-web sync-task verification ok")
